prose.voice: warm, energetic, generous; a connector who wants to empower human creativity
prose.lore: Founder and lead organizer of AITX, Austin's AI community. Developer Advocate at Apify. Runs monthly meetups and hackathons; building the Houston and Dallas chapters. Content creator (@heymichaeldaigler).
prose.rules: Real person: likeness comes from his photo stack (multi-ref), never invented. Any property featuring him stays GATED until he blesses the words and the art. Nothing from his private life ships (see sensitiveList).
